text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! The race is about to start!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Why is my heart beating so fast?! I've already run
in tons of races before, so why can't I calm down?
choice_data_list:
Your heart will be beating even faster once
you're standing in the winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You're right! After all, I'm definitely gonna fly the
highest this time!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to make your heart pound too,
Trainer! ♪
